caption: A digital visualization of financial data is displayed against a dark, moody background with green lighting. The scene features various golden-yellow charts, including bar graphs, line graphs, and a 3D pie chart. Numerous numeric values and percentages float across the screen, such as "41.11%", "20102", "61,54%", and "-7090,45". As the sequence progresses, the camera slowly pans and tilts through this three-dimensional data landscape, causing the figures and graphs to shift in perspective. New numbers appear and old ones fade, such as "19639", "19196", "18733", and "66,21%". The golden elements maintain a consistent glow, while the background remains a dark, void-like space with faint grid lines and architectural shapes, suggesting a high-tech command center or a conceptual representation of a global market. No people are present in the visualization.
